subcodes.first_line: The True One, exalted be His glory, hath rendered the world unto the kings, who are the manifestations of His power, and unto the hosts that protect the cities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله عالم را بملوک که مظاهر قدرت اویند عطا فرمود و بجنود ظاهره مدائن
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
